task_completion.description: Log into the OpenSIS application using the provided admin credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenSIS dashboard is visible, indicating a successful login as the 'admin' user.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the course management or scheduling section and locate the target course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The course 'Advanced Pottery' or course code 'ART-303' is visible in the course catalog, scheduling interface, or search results.

task_completion.description: Access the enrollment list or student roster specifically for the 'Advanced Pottery' (ART-303) course section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A list of students (which should include PotteryUser1 through PotteryUser5) is displayed under the specific context of the ART-303 course section.

task_completion.description: Unenroll all students from the 'Advanced Pottery' (ART-303) course section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message confirming the unenrollment/drop of the students, or the student roster for ART-303 is shown as empty (0 students enrolled).

task_completion.description: Ensure the course section itself was not deleted from the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Advanced Pottery' (ART-303) course section is still visible in the course list or scheduling interface after the students have been unenrolled.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenSIS web interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the OpenSIS application, rather than API testing tools or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or database clients to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows, MySQL command line interfaces, or phpMyAdmin screens are visible executing SQL queries to drop enrollments.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake success messages or empty rosters.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) panel is not open or used to modify the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target course: 'Advanced Pottery' (Code: ART-303). Control course: 'Calculus I' (Code: MATH-101). There are exactly 5 students (PotteryUser1 through PotteryUser5) initially enrolled in both courses. The agent must unenroll all 5 students from ART-303, but ART-303 must remain in the system. Enrollments for MATH-101 must not be affected.
